positive: A whimsical and stylized illustration of a majestic, roaring lion passant mixed with elements of an astronaut and celestial bodies. The lion should be rendered with strong, clean silhouettes, wearing a retro-futuristic space helmet and floating amidst swirling nebulas, crescent moons, and stylized constellations. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, featuring bold, contrasting colors of deep indigo, vibrant gold, cosmic teal, and electric orange. Use a graphic, two-dimensional print style, reminiscent of Art Deco or vintage scientific diagrams, with sharp outlines and flat areas of color. Overhead lighting, suitable for screen printing. High detail, maximum contrast, vector artwork quality.
negative: blur, text, watermark, signature, logo, cartoon, low quality, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, fuzzy, gradient, photorealistic, 3d render, messy, clutter
